category_sources: source_facts.description: Static analysis tool for Kubernetes YAML files and Helm charts; official docs are for KubeLinter.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site title uses KubeLinter.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation domain is docs.kubelinter.io; official repository README is secondary.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/stackrox/kube-linter, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes YAML and Helm static analysis; source_facts.executables lists kube-linter.
